issues.claim: Reproducible in code or org practice (not pure metaphor)
issues.objection: Reproducibility check for 7.30: the implication field gives a concrete next-action a team could perform within a quarter. The concrete_scenario references specific tooling (Postgres / Kafka / GitHub / Datadog / Jaeger / Redis / GCP / etc., depending on verse) and specific role-shapes; the falsifiability field forecloses the soft reading. The verse is not pure metaphor; it is reproducible at engineering practice scope. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Chapter-closing verse. Heavy metaphysics: adhibhūta/adhidaiva/adhiyajña + prayāṇa-kāla. Forward-pointer to Ch 8 honored explicitly. Engineering analog scoped at career-end-departure substrate-articulation. Counter-example: performative all-hands talk that does not survive the team's actual problems is the failure mode.

notes: Reproducibility check for 7.30: implication is testable in practice. PASS.
